---
title: "Projects"
subtitle: "Public engineering, statistical, and reproducible reporting projects"
toc: false
---

# Projects

This page provides an overview of my public engineering, applied statistics, and reproducible reporting projects.

The emphasis is on transparent methods, evidence-based decision making, and reproducible technical workflows. All material presented here is public and does not include confidential or proprietary information.

---

## Featured Projects

### [Treatment Performance Assessment Framework](treatment-performance-assessment/index.qmd)

A public-facing example of how long-term wastewater treatment data can be assessed using reproducible reporting, descriptive statistics, reliability-based summaries, and engineering interpretation.

This page does not include site names, supplier names, proprietary information, confidential assessments, or project-specific data.


Topics include:

- descriptive statistics
- treatment performance
- reliability assessment
- statistical graphics
- engineering discussion
- reproducible technical reporting

---

## Projects Under Development

### Wastewater Engineering Statistics

Statistical methods for evaluating wastewater treatment performance using long-term monitoring data.

Status: *In development.*

---

### Technology Assessment Framework

Frameworks for evidence-based evaluation of wastewater technologies using engineering judgement, uncertainty analysis, and field performance.

Status: *In development.*

---

### Reproducible Reporting

Examples demonstrating Quarto, Python, R, Git, and GitHub for producing transparent engineering reports.

Status: *In development.*

---

### Environmental Data Analytics

Methods for analysing environmental monitoring data using reproducible statistical workflows.

Status: *In development.*

---

## Future Projects

As this website grows, additional public projects will be added, including:

- engineering statistics
- reliability-based assessment
- environmental data science
- technical writing
- teaching resources
- open-source tools
